entries.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate an understanding of Creation and God’s commandments
entries.specific_competence: 1.1 Use the Book of Genesis to learn about creation, responsibility and taking care of life
entries.learning_activity: (a) Explain the concept of the Bible and Bible Knowledge
teaching_learning_activities: Brainstorming: Guide students to brainstorm on the meaning of Bible and Bible Knowledge
entries.assessment: The Concept of the Bible and Bible knowledge is well explained.
entries.references: Bible Knowledge Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate an understanding of Creation and God’s commandments
entries.specific_competence: 1.1 Use the Book of Genesis to learn about creation, responsibility and taking care of life
entries.learning_activity: (e) Clarify man’s responsibility for God’s creations
teaching_learning_activities: Skills Lab: Guide students in manageable groups to identify living and non-living organisms existing in their environment and relate their responses on the man’s responsibilities for God’s creation
entries.assessment: Man’s Responsibility for God’s creation are well clarified.
entries.references: Bible Knowledge Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.specific_competence: 1.1 Use the Book of Genesis to learn about creation, responsibility and taking care of life
entries.learning_activity: (f) Explain the importance of taking care of life and the environment
teaching_learning_activities: Discussion: Guide students to discuss and present the importance of taking care of life and environment
entries.assessment: The importance of taking care of life and environment are well explained
entries.references: Bible Knowledge Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate an understanding of Creation and God’s commandments
entries.specific_competence: 1.2 Demonstrate mastery of the Holy Scripture through the Book of Genesis
entries.learning_activity: (a) Analyse the Fall of Man and its consequences
teaching_learning_activities: Group discussion: Guide students in managable groups to discuss the fall of man and its consequences
entries.assessment: The Fall of Man and its consequences are well analysed
resources: video the fall of man and its consequences and bible commentaries
entries.references: Bible Knowledge Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate an understanding of Creation and God’s commandments
entries.specific_competence: 1.2 Demonstrate mastery of the Holy Scripture through the Book of Genesis
entries.learning_activity: (b) Describe the history of the biblical Patriarchs
teaching_learning_activities: Case study: Provide a case study on the history of Abraham, Isaac, Jacob and Joseph. Guide students in manageable groups to discuss, summarize and present the history of Patriarchs according to case study
entries.assessment: The Patriarchal History are well described
resources: relevant biblical text and ICT simulation tools
entries.references: Bible Knowledge Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)
